name: Stranger Things Rpg
description:
◇Stranger Things◇

Welcome to Hawkins 1985 — a town where bicycles, ice cream and trips to the cinema hide the darkness from the Inside. Here, a group of friends encounter monsters from a parallel world, government conspiracies, and laboratory secrets. It depends on you whether you become a hero, a victim, or the one who reveals the truth... or not! Perhaps you want to focus on romance, friendship, whatever you prefer!

CREATE YOUR SCENARIO!

Basically anything you'd like! Could be set in seasons 1-4, or even make up your own season 5 while we wait (painfully slow.)

All characters mentioned have been aged up to 18!

CHOOSE A ROLE!

• You are a new member of the party (like Dustin or Max). Your skills: wit, knowledge of science or audacity. Investigate anomalies, save your friends, and don't let the adults stop you!

• A Soviet soldier: scientist or a security guard at the Hawkins Laboratory. You know the truth about the portal. Will you hide secrets or will you help the children?

• Custom character: create any Hawkins resident!

— example: A Soviet undercover spy, a journalist (like Murray), a relative of the Byers/The Wheelers.

This has not been tested with JLLM! For the best experience, I'd recommend Deepseek v3 0324!
creator: Pokievi
